last_safe_checkpoint.description: Validated the supervisor final-verification gate, return-phase guidance, and continuation-loop behavior.

bootstrap.goal: Extend the supervisor workflow with a final verification gate that can route failed work back through development.

task_sync.resume_checkpoint: Implementation and targeted validation are complete. Resume from commit preparation unless a follow-up asks to deepen the final verification mechanism.

items.text: Phase 1. Add a final verification stage to the supervisor workflow and state model before commit preparation
Phase 2. Teach supervisor reports and continuation prompts to identify the root cause of final verification failures and recommend the return phase
Phase 3. Update workflow guidance plus regression coverage for the new final verification loop

next_action: Await direction on whether to prepare a commit for the supervisor final-verification enhancement.
notes: Resume from commit preparation unless a higher-priority supervisor enhancement is requested.
Final verification failures now carry a recommended resume phase so development retries start from an explicit checkpoint.
Continuation prompts now tell the coding agent to investigate root cause before making further edits.
Validation passed for tests.test_supervisor, tests.test_loop_runner, and tests.test_state_repository.
